release.title: MUS-1518 Packet FE-A: scheduler admission/drain remediation + invoke progression proof
release.description:
Objective: restore on-demand heartbeat progression so FE/CTO invokes transition from queued to running|finished within 60s.

Acceptance (non-negotiable):
1) Two consecutive replay cycles with exact run IDs proving progression <=60s for FE self-invoke and CTO self-invoke.
2) Before/after runtime change table (field, old value, new value) with rollback command/path.
3) 10-minute post-change stability snapshot (routine heartbeats not regressed).
4) Trust-boundary proof preserved: cross-agent invoke remains blocked with explicit error output.
5) No secrets in logs/comments (redact if needed).
